name: WASGAU Produktions & Handels AG
summary: WASGAU Produktions & Handels AG engages in the food retail business. It offers bakery products consisting of cakes, sweet pastries, cold and warm snacks, and breads; fruits, vegetables, and herbs; beef and veal, lamb, pig, poultry, and meat and sausage product; wines; and confectionery products under the WASGAU bakery, WASGAU Bio, WASGAU MARKEN, WASGAU Schnippelk√É¬ºche, WASGAU butcher, and WASGAU Br√É¬§u brands. The company operates 75 supermarkets and hypermarkets under the WASGAU name; and six cash-and-carry businesses as a partner for restaurants and bulk consumers. It also provides its products through online. The company was founded in 1925 and is headquartered in Pirmasens, Germany. WASGAU Produktions & Handels AG is a subsidiary of Wasgau Food Beteiligungsgesellschaft mbH.
